text: Here I am in a place dedicated to knowledge and exploration—a museum or an innovation center, perhaps. The environment is clean, modern, and intentional in its design. I find myself standing before an exhibit on research and development. There’s a sense of curiosity stirring in me, laced with a quiet awe for human creativity and ambition. I feel both small and elevated—a humble observer drawn into big ideas and the machinery of progress. The colors and words spark thoughts about how we continually push boundaries, finding new ways to coexist with the intelligent things we create. I feel alive to possibility.
